title: nbx demo dev --help
stdout_full:
Usage: root demo dev [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                               
                                                                                
 Developer-focused tools against the demo.netbox.dev profile.

│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │

│       <method> --path ...).                                                  │
